steps.t: The railway tunnel is directly west of Gufi's camp, and can be reached by following the track directly there. Gufi has asked you to scout the tunnel i…
Signposts can be found in the rail-tunnels of the Silvertine Lodes near the dead ends. You should hang signs where the rails lead to dead ends.
Gufi is at the central encampment in the Silvertine Lodes. You should return to Gufi with the results of your survey.
